appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaylis: An object that represents the virtual gateway's listener's Secret Discovery Service certificate.The proxy must be configured with a local SDS provider via a Unix Domain Socket. See App Mesh[TLS documentation](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/app-mesh/latest/userguide/tls.html) for more info.

appmesh.virtualgateway.virtualgatewaylis.Description: A reference to an object that represents the name of the secret secret requested from the Secret Discovery Service provider representing Transport Layer Security (TLS) materials like a certificate or certificate chain.
